name: figo
description: figo plugin marketplace — Figma/HTML designs as pixel-faithful native apps

plugins.name: figo
plugins.displayName: figo — Figma/HTML designs as pixel-faithful native apps
plugins.description: Turn Figma designs and HTML/React pages into pixel-faithful native apps (design + JS runtime). Includes the full AI closed loop: scaffold, design via figoedit MCP, script, screenshot self-verify — plus prebuilt engine-prefab exporters (Cocos / Unity / Godot) in prebuild/, no build step needed (source in the companion figo-convert repo).
